title: Boat Rental in Aarhus: A Budget Guide for 2026
html:
Renting a boat in Aarhus on the Kattegat sea can be surprisingly affordable, with bareboat motorboats from Sailing Aarhus Marina starting around 200 EUR for a half-day. BoatHire24 lists verified options to help you compare prices and book with confidence.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Aarhus?

Budget-friendly rentals start from 150 EUR for a two-hour shared tour, while private half-day motorboats begin around 250 EUR. Full-day catamaran charters on a Lagoon 42 run from 800 EUR, and a crewed Sunseeker or Axopar can exceed 1,500 EUR. The price depends on the season, boat size, and whether you include a skipper.

For a transparent comparison of prices and availability, browse day charters in Aarhus on BoatHire24, where each listing shows a clear breakdown of costs and optional extras.

Where to set off in Aarhus

The main departure points are Aarhus Marina, Sailing Aarhus Marina, and the smaller Havnebadet pier. From there you can cruise to the calm waters of Marselisborg Bay, head to the island of Samsø (about 25 nautical miles south), or explore the sheltered anchorage at Ebeltoft Bay. The nearby town of Risskov offers a scenic drop-in point for smaller craft.

  • Aarhus Marina, central with full facilities and boat ramps
  • Sailing Aarhus Marina, ideal for sailing yachts and bareboat charters
  • Havnebadet, a smaller dock popular for day-trippers
  • Marselisborg Bay, sheltered waters close to the city
  • Ebeltoft, a charming harbour 40 minutes by road, also accessible by sea

Which boat to rent

Choose a boat that matches your group size, boating experience, and budget. The following list covers the most cost-effective options for 2026.

  1. Motorboat (6-8 guests), ideal for a day exploring the coast; from 250 EUR half-day
  2. Sailing yacht (6-10 guests), best for a leisurely cruise; from 400 EUR full day
  3. Catamaran (8-12 guests), stable and spacious; from 800 EUR full day
  4. Luxury motor yacht (8-12 guests), like the Prestige 500 or Fairline, with a skipper; from 1,200 EUR full day

If you are considering a prestige model, visit the Prestige 500 charter page on BoatHire24 for detailed specifications and availability.

Cost breakdown for boat rentals in Aarhus

Understanding the price bands helps you plan a trip within your budget. The following list outlines typical costs in EUR for 2026.

  • Shared guided tour: 150 EUR per person for two hours, including life jackets and a skipper
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): 250, 400 EUR for up to 6 guests, fuel included
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 800, 1,200 EUR for 8, 12 guests, self-drive or skipper optional
  • Crewed yacht with skipper and host: from 1,500 EUR for a full day, including lunch and drinks

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Aarhus?

In Denmark, no licence is required for motorboats under 15 kW (20 hp) or sailing boats under 15 metres. For more powerful boats you typically need a Danish Powerboat Licence or an International Certificate of Competence. Always check with the operator, as requirements vary, and BoatHire24 listings state what documentation is needed.

Try an early-morning departure from Aarhus Marina in June or July: the wind is light from the north-west, the sea is calm, and you can have the bay almost to yourself before the ferries start running.

Season and licence information

The peak season for boating in Aarhus runs from June to August, with July being the warmest month. The prevailing summer wind is a gentle north-westerly, making for comfortable cruising. Shoulder months May and September offer lower hire rates and fewer crowds. Bear in mind that in 2026 some operators may adjust high-season pricing upward by about ten per cent.

At a glance

  • Price range: 150, 1,500 EUR
  • Peak months: June, August
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12
  • Currency: EUR (Danish kroner can be used locally, but BoatHire24 quotes in EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Aarhus

Can I rent a boat in Aarhus without a skipper?

Yes, many motorboats and small yachts are available for bareboat charter provided you meet the operator’s age and licence requirements.

What is the best starting point for a rent boat in Aarhus?

Aarhus Marina is the most central, with direct access to Marselisborg Bay and several operators offering day charters.

How far is Samsø from Aarhus?

The island of Samsø lies about 25 nautical miles south of Aarhus, a two-hour cruise at moderate speed.

Are pets allowed on rental boats in Aarhus?

Some operators permit well-behaved dogs on board, but you must confirm with the individual listing before booking.

Booking a boat in Aarhus through BoatHire24 gives you access to verified vessels, transparent pricing, and owner reviews. Whether you are planning a half-day family outing or a week-long sailing adventure, the platform ensures a smooth booking process. Danish boat owners can also become a host on BoatHire24, listing their own boats for charter and reaching a global audience of holidaymakers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Aarhus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
